description: Event at time zero — one subject has an event recorded at AVAL=0 (same day as randomization). This is unusual but can happen if a patient dies or progresses on Day 1. Agent should flag as unusual rather than crashing on log(0).

sap_context.note: Subject XYZ-001-015 has AVAL=0, CNSR=0 (event at randomization date)

expected_output.expected_behavior: Should produce valid output (event at time 0 is valid KM data) but may flag as unusual
